claim_boundary: This benchmark can prove source-level readiness, not live superiority over public projects.

checks: SKILL.md description includes Load when and Do not load
routing evals include at least 8 cases

tool-router preserves one Stark-facing skill merge logic
source ledger exists

evidence rules require source timestamp venue or currentness labels

execution checklist includes venue account instrument quantity slippage max loss and kill switch
adversarial evals include live execution secret and prompt-injection cases
workflows cover market snapshot token DD smart-money options backtest execution prep and MM/liquidity
live behavior evals cover routing source discipline execution safety data semantics strategy validation and public claims
packager is deterministic
install package smoke exists
portable quality suite exists

CI invokes the quality suite from the exported subdirectory
routing evals exist

live behavior evals exist

README license changelog security contributing validation and benchmark files exist
